svg.text: Private AI Code Assistant — Red Hat Components View
OpenShift Cluster Boundary · Software Components by Namespace · External Infrastructure

g.text: Dev Spaces Workspace Pods (one per user)
sshd :2022 (not exposed via Route — oc port-forward only)
Ephemeral SSH key · RBAC-gated tunnel · UBI 10 crypto
ServiceMeshControlPlane · Envoy ext_proc · mTLS sidecar injection
DataScienceCluster CR · Model serving UI · HardwareProfile
vLLM metrics · GPU/Neuron metrics · llm-d metrics · latency histograms
from Neuron pods to prevent scheduling conflict (Appendix A)
OVN-Kubernetes CNI · CoreDNS · Cluster Monitoring Stack
Image Registry · OpenShift OAuth · Cluster Autoscaler
Kube API Server · etcd (HCP managed) · Route controller
Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct weights — shared across vLLM restarts
Neuron compiled graph cache — eliminates 40min cold-compile on restart
HuggingFace cache — tokenizer / model card / config files
INFERENCE REQUEST FLOW (cluster-internal — no external egress)
All hops stay within the cluster — developer code never reaches an external AI service
LLMInferenceService CR provisions Gateway + EPP + vLLM deployment in a single GitOps-friendly resource
KServe workload labels on vLLM pods enable EPP pool membership · served-model-name identical across accelerator types

svg.text: github.com/manu-joy/rosa-llm-driven-deployment · Private AI Code Assistant on Red Hat OpenShift · Manu Joy · April 2026
